raw_text: For me this app has been so good as long as a customer your patient and realistic and not too judgy over little things, I found blinkit so much better, some people criticize too much which is hypocritical!
Very good to buy large cart items with good pricing also easy to use and navigate , no ads and gives very fast response .
this app has many issues that I can't cancel the wrong order and they are delivered the frozen item melted and they are not responding properly
I have been ordering ice cream and frozen items. Blinkit delivers them in ice boxes. This is much better than buying from the market and bringing them home by myself.

i add money to order by blinkit wallet but it's can't work and don't respond to email when I completed and also non refundable money and I order by use blinkit wallet after 1week after finishing some offers which I use in previous
Super fast delivery and fresh products! Blinkit never disappoints. It has truly made life so much easier. 5 stars! ⭐⭐⭐⭐
customer support is pathetic, my 1 item was missing, after delivering told me it is out of stock, not even returning my order , their services are extremely bad.
This is the waste of money. They not respond for anything. The damage product were sale. They don't give replacement or refund. Not any support team will assist.
I like the app, but I wanted their to be an option where I could request a new product to be added, that would have been very helpful.

I have been ordering from Blinkit for the past month and am quite happy that I no longer have to stand in line to buy things from Smart Bazaar. To test the service, I placed an order at 6:00 AM, and the delivery person arrived at my home by 6:09 AM.

best app, very supportive,fresh material,much much better than other app,loved it,so much good,even after suffering from health issue, consultation with doctor and medicine at my door, wonderful,impressive, very good,keep growing
Some time they cheating. At the time of ordering the shows one amount but at the time of payment they charge additional charges.
this app is really good and delivery is really fast... but there are few products only or some are Always out of stock and some are Always coming soom please add more products 👍🏻its will be good 🤌🏻

Scam for surge charge. while placing the order it was mentioned that there will be no surge charge for order 499 and above..but still I am charged.And now they Have AI customer support which is useless and unhelpful
Blinkit App is Okay but delivery partner not Good .. recently i have place and order and that one delivered but 1 product has MRP issue i,e MRP is 105/- and they do billing 110/- that's not good.
Completely un professional approach. Book order without having stock and then delaying in refund. Really disappointed...
The product quality was excellent, and the packaging was also very good. The delivery partner was polite and professional. Blinkit is very helpful during emergencies. Thank you!

"I really like Blinkit's service, especially for bachelors. It saves a lot of time and effort by delivering daily essentials quickly right to my home. Please keep up the good work. Thank you! blinkit team @blinkit

Worst experience. I had ordered a steel water bottle for my son, next day, i send it to his school, he complained that water was leaking. i wrote my son's name on the bottle as soon as i received the product because I was unaware of its defect. I returned the item on 8th July and today is 14th of July, still I have not received my refund. Very bad experience.

if items are missing in order only chat support is available and if the replacement is also delivered in damaged or incomplete form then the app provides no other means or resolution - leaving customer frustrated
